name: trodoai/skills
description: Trodo skill swarm — orchestrator + two comprehensive master skills (events, agent tracing). Each master skill loads modules inline for its sub-areas (identify, groups, custom events, sessions for events; vercel-ai, otel, langchain, openai, mcp for tracing). Future heal/developer skills slot in as additional top-level entries following the same 6-phase contract.

future_bundles.heal: Reserved for future developer/healing skills (trodo-heal-*). Same 6-phase skill contract; orchestrated by trodo-install in diagnose mode.
